title: Assisting users with efficient information sharing among social connections
abstract: In one embodiment, a method, includes receiving a sharing request to share content generated during a current dialog session from a client system associated with a first user, identifying one or more content objects associated with the sharing request based on a natural-language understanding module, wherein the one or more content objects were previously generated during the current dialog session, determining one or more second users the sharing request is directed to based on a user profile associated with first user, and sending instructions for accessing one or more of the identified content objects to one or more client systems associated with, the one or more second users.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1 , A method comprising, by one or more computing systems: receiving, from a client system associated with a first user, a sharing request to share content generated during a current dialog session; identifying, based on a natural-language understanding module, one or more content objects associated with the sharing request, wherein the one or more content objects were previously generated during the current dialog session; determining, based on a user profile associated with first user, one or more second users the sharing request is directed to: and sending, to one or more client systems associated with the one or more second users, instructions for accessing one or more of the identified content objects 2 The method of Claim 1, wherein the sharing request is associated with a user input, the user input comprising one or more of a character string, an image, a video, or an audio clip. 3 The method of Claim 2, further comprising: identifying the sharing request from the user input based on one or more machine-learning models 4, The method of Claim 2, wherein identifying the one or more content objects comprises: determining one or more slots associated with the user input accessing a user context engine; and identifying the one or more content objects based on the one or more slots and the user context engine, 5, The method of Claim 2, wherein identifying the one or more content objects comprises: determining one or more slots associated with the user input; 

 accessing a dialog state associated with the current di log session, wherein the dialog state is stored in a data store and comprises information associated with the one or more content objects previously generated during the current dialog session; and identifying the one or more content objects based on the one or more slots and the dialog state. 6. The method of Claim 5, wherein the dialog state further comprises the one or more content objects previously generated during the current dialog session. 7. The method of Claim 1 , wherein each of the one or more content objects is associated with one or more of an identifier of the first user or an expiration time. 8. The method of Claim 7, wherein each of the one or more of the identified content objects is selected if it is associated with an elapsed time less than the respective expiration time associated with it. 9. The method of Claim 2, wherein determining the one or more second users the sharing request is directed to compr es; determining one or more slots associated with the user input, wherein the one or more slots comprise one or more user slots; and resolving the one or more user slots to identify one or more entities associated with the one or more second users based on the user profile associated with the first user. 10. The metho of Claim 1, wherein the one or more of the identified content objects are determined based on privacy settings associated with the respective content objects. 1 1. The method of Claim 1, wherein the one or more previously generated content objects correspond to a previous assistance request from the first user during the current dialog session. 12. The method of Claim 1 , further comprising: determining, for each of the one or more second users, one or more modalities associated with the one or more second users. 13. The method of Claim 12, wherein the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to each of the one or more second users is based on the determined one or more modalities. 14. The method of Claim 12, wherein the one or more modalities comprise text, audio, image, video, or a combination thereof. 15. The method of Claim 12. further comprising: generating one or more communication contents for the one or more second users, respectively, wherein each communication content is based on the determined one or more modalities for the respective second user. 16. The method of Claim 1, further comprising: determining whether the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to the respective client system associated with each of the one or more second users is successful based on one or more signals from the respective second user. 17. The method of Claim 16, further comprising: generating, for the first user, one or more communication contents, wherein each communication content comprises a status associated with the sharing request to each second user, the status indicating whether the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to the respective client system is successful; and sending, to the client system associated with the first user, the one or more communication contents for display in the current dialog session. 18. The method of Claim 17, further comprising: 

 upon determining the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to the respective client system is successful, initiating a message thread between the first user and the respective second user 19 The method of Claim L wherein the sending of the one or more of die identified content objects to each client system associated with the respective second user is associated with a notification indicating that the one or more of the identified content objects are shared by the first user. 20 One or more computer-readable non-transitory storage media embodying software that is operable when executed to: receive from a client system associated with a first user a sharing request to share content generated during a current dialog session; identify, based on a natural-language processing module, one or more content objects associated with the sharing request, wherein the one or more content objects were previously generated during the current dialog session; determine, based on a user profile associated with first user, one or more second users the sharing request is directed to; and send, to one or more client systems associated with the one or more second users, one or more of the identified content objects. 21 , A system comprising: one or more processors; and a non-transitory memory coupled to the processors comprising instructions executable by the processors, the processors operable when executing the instructions to: receive, from a client system associated with a first user, a sharing request to share content generated during a current dialog session; identify, based on a natural-language processing module, one or more content objects associated with the sharing request, wherein the one or more content objects were previously generated during the current dialog session; 

 determine, based on a user profile associated with first user, one or more second users the sharing reques is directed to; and send, to one or more client systems associated with the one or more second users, one or more of the identified content objects. 22. A method, in particular for use in an assistant system for assisting a user to obtain information or sendees by enabling the user to interact with the assistant system with user input in conversations to get assistance, wherein the user input includes voice, text, image or video or any combination of them, the assistant system in particular being enabled by the combination of computing devices, application programming interfaces (APIs), and the proliferation of applications on user devices, comprising, by one or more computing systems: receiving, from a client system associated with a first user, a sharing request to share content generated during a current dialog session; identifying, based on a natural-language understanding module, one or more content objects associated with the sharing request, wherein the one or more content objects were previously generated during the current dialog session; determining, based on a user profile associated with first user, one or more second users the sharing request is directed to; and sending, to one or more client systems associated with the one or more second users, instructions for accessing one or more of the identified content objects. 23. The method of Claim 22, wherein the sharing request is associated with a user input, the user input co prising one or more of a character string, an image, a video, or an audio clip. 24. The method of Claim 23, further comprising: identifying the sharing request from the user input based on one or more machine-learning 25 The method of Claim 23, wherein identifying the one or more content objects comprises: determining one or more slots associated with the user input; accessing a user context engine; and identifying the one or more content objects based on the one or more slots and the user context engine: and/or wherein identifying the one or more content objects comprises: determining one or more slots associated with the user input; accessing a dialog state associated with the current dialog session, wherein the dialog state is stored in a data store and comprises information associated with the one or more content objects previously generated during the current dialog session; and identifying the one or more content objects based on the one or more slots and the dialog state; optionally, wherein the dialog state further comprises the one or more content objects previously generated during the current dialog session 26 The method of any of Claims 22 to 25, wherein each of the one or more content objects is associated with one or more of an identifier of the first user or an expiration time; optionally, wherein each of the one or more of the identified content objects is selected if it is associated with an elapsed time less than the respective expiration time associated with it. 27 The method of any of Claims 22 to 26, wherein determining the one or more second users the sharing request is directed to comprises: determining one or more slots associated with the user input, wherein the one or more slots comprise one or more user slots; and resolving the one or more user slots to identify one or more entities associated with the one or more second users based on the user profile associated with the first user. 28. The method of any of Claims 22 to 27, wherein the one or more of the identified content objects are determined based on privacy settings associated with the respective content objects; and/or wherein the one or more previously generated content objects correspond to a previous assistance request from the first user during the current dialog session. 29. The method of any of Claims 22 to 28, further comprising: determining, for each of the one or more second users, one or more modalities associated with the one or more second users; and/or optionally, wherein the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to each of the one or more second users is based on the determined one or more modalities: and/or optionally, wherein the one or more modalities comprise text, audio, image, video, or a combination thereof; and/or optionally, further comprising: generating one or more communication contents for the one or more second users, respectively, wherein each communication content is based on the determined one or more modalities for the respective second user. 30. The method of any of Claims 22 to 29, further comprising: determining whether the sending of the one or more of the identifie content objects to the respective client system associated with each of the one or more second users is successful based on one or more signals from the respective second user; optionally, further comprising: generating, for the first user, one or more communication contents, wherein each communication content comprises a status associated with the sharing request to each second user, 

 the status indicating whether the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to the respective client system is successful; and sending, to the client system associated with the first user, the one or more communication contents for display in the current dialog session; optionally, further comprising: upon determining the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to the respective client system is successful, initiating a message thread between the first user and the respective second user. 31. The method of any of Claims 22 to 30, wherein the sending of the one or more of the identified content objects to each client system associate with the respective second user is associated with a notification indicating that the one or more of the identified content objects are shared by the first user. 32. One or more computer-readable non-transiiory storage media embodying software that is operable when executed to perform a method according to any of Claims 22 to 31. 33 A system, in particular an assistant system for assisting a user to obtain information or services by enabling the user to interact with the assistant system with user input in conversations to get assistance, wherein the user input includes voice, text, image or video or any combination of them, the assistant system in particular being enabled by the combination of computing devices, application programming interfaces (APIs), and the proliferation of applications on user devices, the system comprising: one or more processors: and a non-transitory memory coupled to the processors comprising instructions executable by the processors, the processors operable when executing the instructions to perform a method according to any of Claims 22 to 31. 34. The assistant system of claim 33 for assisting the user by executing at least one or more of the folio wing features or steps: 

 - create and store a user profile comprising both personal and contextual information associated with the user - analyze the user input using natural- language understanding, wherein the analysis may be based on the user profile for more personalized and context-aware understanding - resolve entities associated with the user input based on the analysis - interact with different agents to obtain Information or sendees that are associated with the resolved entities - generate a response for the user regarding the information or services by using natural- language generation - through the interaction with the user, use dialog management techniques to manage and forward the conversation flow with the user - assist the user to effectively and efficiently digest the obtained information by summarizing the information - assist the user to be more engaging with an online social network by providing tools that help the user interact with the online social network (e.g., creating posts, comments, messages) - assist the user to manage different tasks such as keeping track of events - proactively execute pre-authors zed tasks that are relevant to user interests and preferences based on the user profile, at a time relevant for the user, without a user input - check privacy settings whenever it is necessary to guarantee that accessing user profile and executing different tasks are subject to the user's privacy settings. 35. The assistant system of Claim 33 or 34, comprising at least one or more of the following components: - a messaging platform to receive a user input based on a text modality from the client system associated with the user and/or to receive user input based on an image or video modality and to process it using optical character recognition techniques within the messaging platform to convert the user input into text, - an audio speech recognition (ASR) module to receive a user input based on an audio modality (e.g., the user may speak to or send a video including speech) from the client system associated with the user and to convert: the user Input based on the audio modality into text, 

 - an assistant xbot to receive the output of the messaging platform or the ASR module. 36. A system comprising at least one client system (130), in particular an electronic device at least one assistant system (140) according to any of Claims 33 to 35, connected to each other, in particular by a network (110), wherein the client system comprises an assistant application (136) for allowing a user at the client system (130) to interact with the assistant system (140), wherein the assistant application (136) communicates user input to the assistant system (140) and, based on the user input, the assistant system (140) generates responses and sends the generated responses to the assistant application (136) and the assistant application (136) presents the responses to the user at the client system (130), wherein in particular the user input is audio or verbal and the response may be in text or also audio or verbal. 37. The system of Claim 36 further comprising a social-networking system (160), wherein the client system comprises in particular a social-networking application (134) for accessing the social networking system (160).
